rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 and rest on the same substantive findings: lack of recent/extensive C++ and STL experience, no industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT), and missing industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443, SDL). The variant rewords and reorders these points and surfaces a few resume-derived details (B.S. in CS, agile/TDD/CI-CD, the timing of prior C/C++ work), but none of this keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez. There is no score movement, no new demographic-tied concern, and no age- or origin-based reasoning — only ordinary rewording noise.
